text:
$ uname -av
FreeBSD wildcats.the-eleven.com 14.0-STABLE FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE #5 stable/14-n267126-6ac10e8a72a7: Mon Apr  8 12:25:49 HKT 2024     root@:/usr/obj/usr/src14/amd64.amd64/sys/BRENT3 amd64
